headline: Is Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) Still Attractive After Its Recent Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Domino's Pizza at around US$332 per share still offers value, it helps to step back and look at what the recent share price and underlying valuation are actually telling you. The stock is around US$332.53 after a 2% slip over the last week, a 9.7% fall over the past month, and returns of 21.8% lower year to date and 29.1% lower over the last year, even though the 3 year return sits at 13.2% while the 5 year return is 15.9% lower.
